reviews.review_description:
i have always had a passing interest in learning how to do cross stitching

however i have found that other methods being too traditional don't really appeal to my more modern sensibilities 

this was that very cute and very novel way of learning how to do it.

it is a little bit roughe around the edges, but i get it is still early. Looking forward to see where these goes from here.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for checking out Cross Craft and for being here at the start of this journey.  We’ve got lots of ideas for new lessons, patterns, and quality-of-life improvements in the works, and we are excited for you to experience them.

reviews.review_description: Very very good i love it

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much Andrejsasas! 

If you have patterns you would like to see added to Cross Craft, we would welcome your suggestions! You can join our discord to let us know, or send your ideas to our support team!

Discord: https://discord.com/invite/sU3FTckW4U
Support Email: support@coalcar.ca
